name: Sales & Fundraising
description: AI safety has the research but can't close. The people who should be funding this work aren't — because nobody's making the case in language they respond to. Your persuasion skills are what's missing.
trajectory: Making a compelling case to sceptical audiences is fundraising and donor engagement — AI safety orgs desperately need this.
Understanding what motivates people to say yes maps to stakeholder management and advocacy in AI governance.
Building and managing relationships at scale is coalition building and partnership development — essential for AI safety's growth.
Most AI safety orgs can't raise what they need because nobody on the team knows how to make the ask.

projects.title: Rewrite an AI safety org's pitch
projects.description: Pick an AI safety org's donation page and rewrite it as if you were selling to a sceptical prospect. Send it to them.

projects.title: Diagnose the sales problem
projects.description: Write about why AI safety is a hard sell and develop concrete strategies to make it easier for different donor audiences.

projects.title: Open corporate doors
projects.description: Build relationships with foundations who should be funding AI safety but aren't yet, and develop the case for support.
